hooks.prompt: Review this session and save any important context to the project memory directory at C:\Users\MaurizioDiVitto\.claude\projects\C--Users-MaurizioDiVitto-source-repos-RealObj\memory\. Update MEMORY.md and create or update memory files for: decisions made, plans agreed upon (including full step-by-step implementation plans), user preferences observed, and project state changes. If a plan was discussed or approved this session, save its full detail so it can be resumed in a future session without the user having to repeat it. Only save things that would be useful in a future session. Skip if nothing meaningful happened.
